# Make categories visible within stevehocking.co.uk

## What

Categories provied an ideal way to navigate related content. The majority of posts within stevehocking.co.uk have category information, but this is not surfaced.

## Requirements

• Research key display sizes that pages must work in (mobile and desktop)
• Make the post title a little bolder 
• Move post tagline and date off the hero image
• Add `jekyll-category-pages` Plugin 🔌(see [Copilot Chat](./copilot-chat.md))
• Add a page listing categories, this will live at `/categories/`, style the same as main and about pages 
• For each category list the posts in reverse date order, reuse the formatting from the main page 
• On the post page provide three options for displaying categories beneath the tag line and date, the category should link to the category page
